productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Navy Blue Striped Shirt
description: Composition Black and white striped shirt made of 100% cotton, has a spread collar, full button placket, full sleeves with buttoned cuffs, embroidery on the left chest and a curved hem Fit Comfort Wash care Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees using a mild detergent Do not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleach Dry flat in shade Warm iron do not iron directly on print/embroidery Impeccable cuts and a luxury construction is a winning sartorial combination - and this shirt from united colors of benetton has both. Lead yourself to a new generation of style and sophistication with this cotton shirt. Pair it with straight fit formal trousers, classy accessories and shiny oxfords. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
